name: omniaffiliate-ai-engine
description: OmniAffiliate AI Engine — Affiliate automation platform

scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:migrate:products && npm run db:migrate:content && npm run db:migrate:publish && npm run db:migrate:config
scripts.db:migrate:products: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --config=./src/modules/product-management/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate:content: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --config=./src/modules/content-factory/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate:publish: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --config=./src/modules/distribution-hub/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate:config: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --config=./src/modules/config/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:push: npm run db:push:products && npm run db:push:content && npm run db:push:publish && npm run db:push:config
scripts.db:push:products: cd backend && npx prisma db push --config=./src/modules/product-management/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:push:content: cd backend && npx prisma db push --config=./src/modules/content-factory/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:push:publish: cd backend && npx prisma db push --config=./src/modules/distribution-hub/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:push:config: cd backend && npx prisma db push --config=./src/modules/config/prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:generate: npm run db:generate:products && npm run db:generate:content && npm run db:generate:publish && npm run db:generate:config
